name: Secret Treat Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
"This recipe has been passed down for generations. I've made these cookies for years, but like my mother, I only make them for special occasions. They're fun to decorate and delicious to eat, with a surprise flavor inside." - Ruby Neese
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar.
2. Add egg; mix well.
3. Beat in molasses.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and ginger; add to creamed mixture and mix well. The dough will be very stiff.
5. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough to 1/8 inch thickness; cut into 2 1/4 to 2 1/2 inch circles.
7. Place 1/2 teaspoon preserves on half of the circles; top with remaining circles. Pinch edges together to seal.
8. Place cookies on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Combine glaze ingredients and frost cooled cookies. Yields: 4 dozen
